key_points: Water scarcity can occur even in regions with sufficient rainfall due to mismanagement
Large dams can cause ecological imbalance and displacement of people
Sedimentation reduces the storage capacity of reservoirs
Integrated water resource management ensures sustainable water use
Community participation is essential for effective water conservation
examples: Sedimentation reduces efficiency of large dams over time
Industrial pollution makes river water unusable
Concrete surfaces in cities reduce groundwater recharge
Traditional systems like khadins store water in agricultural fields
Bamboo drip irrigation minimizes water wastage
formulas_or_concepts: Integrated Water Resource Management (IWRM): Coordinated management of water resources
Sustainable Water Management: Using water efficiently to ensure future availability
Sedimentation: Deposition of sediments in reservoirs reducing storage capacity
exam_tips: Write both advantages and criticisms of multipurpose river projects
Use real-life examples while answering long questions
